headline: 115 years old but driving huge returns in a most modern way
summary: This is the sixth and final piece in a series examining "boring" large-cap stocks that have outperformed the Nasdaq-100 over the past five years. The first piece introduced the methodology and the companies. Over the subsequent few weeks, the series has looked at Curtiss-Wright, Williams Companies, ...

headline: Is Eaton (ETN) Fully Priced On Its VoltServer Partnership?
summary: Eaton (ETN) is back in focus after VoltServer announced a partnership and equity investment that ties Eaton’s power management portfolio to Digital Electricity technology for long-distance, software-defined DC power distribution. See our latest analysis for Eaton. The VoltServer partnership arrives as Eaton’s share price shows strong momentum, with a 12.08% 90 day share price return and a 26.31% year to date share price return, alongside a 3 year total shareholder return of 111.66%. If this...
